summary: The complete legal input domain contains only 720 clock times, so no honest runtime-scaling workload exists.

workload_bound.source_constraint: hour is from 1 through 12 and minutes is from 0 through 59

replacement_checks.evidence: The implementation computes both hand positions and their smaller circular difference with a fixed number of arithmetic operations.
Regression exhaustively checks all 720 legal times against an independent exact-arithmetic oracle expressed in half-degree units.
